description: Awilco LNG ASA, together with its subsidiaries, owns and operates liquefied natural gas (LNG) vessels in Norway. The company owns two 156,000 cbm TFDE membrane LNG vessels. It also provides technical management services. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Oslo, Norway.
